title: Unsafe blocks in tun.rs missing SAFETY comments
description:
10 unsafe blocks in lichen-gateway/src/tun.rs lack // SAFETY: comments.

Lines 40, 62, 65, 73, 74, 76, 83, 96, 121.

All perform libc FFI (open, ioctl, close, fcntl, read, write) but do not document the safety invariants being upheld (e.g., valid fd, correct buffer bounds, alignment requirements).
